restaurants.name: La Bella Italia
restaurants.description: Authentic Italian cuisine with a modern twist. Our chefs bring traditional recipes from Southern Italy with fresh, locally-sourced ingredients.

items.name: Bruschetta al Pomodoro
items.description: Toasted bread with fresh tomatoes and basil

items.name: Calamari Fritti
items.description: Crispy fried squid with lemon aioli

items.name: Arancini
items.description: Golden risotto balls with ragù filling

items.name: Osso Buco
items.description: Braised veal shanks with saffron risotto

items.name: Risotto ai Funghi
items.description: Creamy mushroom risotto with truffle oil

items.name: Spaghetti Carbonara
items.description: Classic pasta with pancetta and pecorino

items.name: Tiramisu
items.description: Traditional mascarpone and coffee dessert

items.name: Panna Cotta
items.description: Silky cream with berry compote

reviews.author: John Smith
reviews.comment: Amazing experience! The pasta was cooked to perfection and the service was excellent.

reviews.author: Maria Garcia
reviews.comment: Best Italian restaurant in Manhattan. Highly recommend the Osso Buco!

reviews.author: Michael Chen
reviews.comment: Great food and atmosphere, but a bit pricey for the portion sizes.

restaurants.name: Sakura Garden
restaurants.description: Experience authentic Japanese cuisine prepared by chefs trained in Tokyo. Fresh sushi, sashimi, and traditional cooked dishes.

items.name: Spicy Tuna Roll
items.description: Tuna, cucumber, avocado with spicy mayo

items.name: Salmon Sashimi
items.description: 5 pieces of fresh Atlantic salmon

items.name: Dragon Roll
items.description: Shrimp tempura, cucumber, avocado topped with eel sauce

items.name: Tonkatsu
items.description: Breaded pork cutlet with panko crust

items.name: Teriyaki Chicken
items.description: Glazed chicken with vegetables and rice

reviews.author: David Lee
reviews.comment: Freshest sushi in Brooklyn! Love coming here every week.

reviews.author: Sarah Johnson
reviews.comment: Great quality sushi at reasonable prices. Service was friendly.

restaurants.name: Spice Route
restaurants.description: Journey through the flavors of India. Our diverse menu features dishes from North, South, and Eastern regions of India.

items.name: Butter Chicken
items.description: Tender chicken in creamy tomato sauce

items.name: Paneer Tikka Masala
items.description: Cottage cheese in aromatic spiced sauce

items.name: Lamb Vindaloo
items.description: Tender lamb in hot and tangy sauce

items.name: Naan
items.description: Traditional Indian flatbread

items.name: Garlic Naan
items.description: Naan with fresh garlic and herbs

items.name: Paratha
items.description: Layered Indian bread

reviews.author: Priya Patel
reviews.comment: Authentic Indian flavors! The best butter chicken I've had in NY.

reviews.author: Raj Kumar
reviews.comment: Excellent spices and great variety. Perfect for families.

reviews.author: Emily Rodriguez
reviews.comment: Very good, though I wish they had more vegetarian options.

restaurants.name: The Steakhouse
restaurants.description: Premium dry-aged steaks and classic American cuisine. Elegant ambiance perfect for special occasions.

items.name: Ribeye 16oz
items.description: Premium dry-aged ribeye with compound butter

items.name: Filet Mignon 10oz
items.description: Tender center cut with truffle jus

items.name: NY Strip 14oz
items.description: Classic strip steak with garlic mashed potatoes

items.name: Truffle Mac & Cheese
items.description: Creamy pasta with shaved truffle

items.name: Garlic Mashed Potatoes
items.description: Creamy with roasted garlic

reviews.author: Thomas Anderson
reviews.comment: Best steaks in town! Perfect for a romantic dinner.

reviews.author: Lisa White
reviews.comment: Excellent quality steaks but service was a bit slow.

restaurants.name: Dragon Palace
restaurants.description: Traditional Cantonese and Sichuan cuisine. Famous for our dim sum and hand-pulled noodles.

items.name: Shrimp Dumpling
items.description: Steamed shrimp and bamboo shoots

items.name: Siu Mai
items.description: Pork and shrimp dumpling

items.name: Har Gow
items.description: Crystal shrimp dumplings

items.name: Hand-Pulled Noodles with Lamb
items.description: Chewy noodles with tender lamb

items.name: Singapore Mei Fun
items.description: Thin rice noodles with shrimp and pork

reviews.author: Wei Chen
reviews.comment: Best dim sum in Chinatown! Always fresh and delicious.

reviews.author: Lisa Wong
reviews.comment: Great selection and authentic taste. A bit noisy during peak hours.

restaurants.name: Casa Mexico
restaurants.description: Authentic Mexican cuisine with recipes passed down through generations. Fresh ingredients and traditional preparation.

items.name: Enchiladas Verdes
items.description: Filled with chicken and smothered in green sauce

items.name: Enchiladas Roja
items.description: Filled with cheese and topped with red sauce

items.name: Al Pastor Tacos
items.description: Marinated pork with pineapple (3 tacos)

items.name: Fish Tacos
items.description: Grilled fish with cabbage slaw (3 tacos)

reviews.author: Carlos Mendez
reviews.comment: Tastes like home! Authentic Mexican flavors at great prices.

reviews.author: Sofia Lopez
reviews.comment: Always busy but worth the wait. Fresh ingredients throughout.

reviews.author: James Martinez
reviews.comment: Great food and service. Perfect for families.

restaurants.name: Olive & Vine
restaurants.description: A warm Mediterranean escape in the heart of Manhattan. Think mezze platters, fresh seafood, and wood-fired lamb with herbs and olive oil from Greece.

items.name: Hummus & Pita
items.description: House-made hummus with warm pita bread

items.name: Spanakopita
items.description: Crispy filo pastry with spinach and feta

items.name: Grilled Halloumi
items.description: Cypriot cheese with lemon and herbs

items.name: Lamb Souvlaki
items.description: Skewered lamb with tzatziki and rice

items.name: Grilled Sea Bass
items.description: Whole sea bass with capers and olive oil

items.name: Moussaka
items.description: Layered eggplant and spiced lamb with béchamel

reviews.author: Nikos Papadopoulos
reviews.comment: Transported me back to Santorini. The lamb souvlaki is unbeatable.

reviews.author: Rachel Kim
reviews.comment: Lovely atmosphere and great wine selection. The mezze platter is a must.

restaurants.name: Bangkok Bites
restaurants.description: Vibrant Thai street food meets refined Midtown dining. Our chefs import spices directly from Bangkok's floating markets.

items.name: Spring Rolls
items.description: Crispy rolls with glass noodles and vegetables

items.name: Tom Yum Soup
items.description: Spicy and sour prawn soup with lemongrass

items.name: Pad Thai
items.description: Stir-fried rice noodles with shrimp, peanuts, and tamarind

items.name: Green Curry
items.description: Thai green curry with chicken and jasmine rice

items.name: Massaman Curry
items.description: Rich peanut curry with beef and potatoes

reviews.author: Chanida Thongchai
reviews.comment: As a Thai native, this feels authentic. The green curry is spot on.

reviews.author: Ben Foster
reviews.comment: Great lunch spot near Times Square. Quick service and flavorful food.

restaurants.name: Le Petit Bistro
restaurants.description: Classic French bistro cuisine in the charming streets of SoHo. Inspired by the brasseries of Lyon and Paris, with an ever-changing seasonal menu.

items.name: Soupe à l'Oignon
items.description: Classic French onion soup with Gruyère crouton

items.name: Escargots de Bourgogne
items.description: Burgundy snails with garlic parsley butter

items.name: Duck Confit
items.description: Slow-cooked duck leg with lentils and Dijon jus

items.name: Sole Meunière
items.description: Pan-fried Dover sole with brown butter and lemon

items.name: Steak Frites
items.description: Hanger steak with hand-cut fries and béarnaise

items.name: Crème Brûlée
items.description: Classic vanilla custard with caramelized sugar

items.name: Tarte Tatin
items.description: Upside-down caramelized apple tart with crème fraîche

reviews.author: Isabelle Dupont
reviews.comment: As French as it gets in New York. The duck confit rivals anything in Paris.

reviews.author: Henry Marsh
reviews.comment: Took my wife for her birthday — perfect evening. Impeccable service.

reviews.author: Anna Kowalski
reviews.comment: Beautiful food and excellent wine list. Slightly small portions for the price.

restaurants.name: Burger Republic
restaurants.description: Smashed patties, fresh-baked buns, and craft sauces. We take burgers seriously — premium beef, hand-cut fries, and over 20 topping combinations.

items.name: Classic Smash
items.description: Double smash patty, American cheese, pickles, special sauce

items.name: Bacon BBQ Melt
items.description: Crispy bacon, cheddar, caramelized onions, BBQ sauce

items.name: Mushroom Swiss
items.description: Sautéed mushrooms, Swiss cheese, garlic aioli

items.name: Hand-Cut Fries
items.description: Golden fries with sea salt

items.name: Onion Rings
items.description: Beer-battered onion rings

items.name: Milkshake
items.description: Vanilla, chocolate, or strawberry

reviews.author: Jake Turner
reviews.comment: Best smash burger in Manhattan. Period. The special sauce is addictive.

reviews.author: Mia Collins
reviews.comment: Always reliable. Great for a quick lunch downtown.

reviews.author: Darius Hayes
reviews.comment: Solid burgers and the onion rings are fantastic.

restaurants.name: Tandoor Nights
restaurants.description: Upscale North Indian cuisine with a focus on tandoor-fired breads and clay-pot curries. Known for our whole roasted chicken and award-winning biryani.

items.name: Chicken Tikka
items.description: Marinated chicken roasted in clay oven

items.name: Seekh Kebab
items.description: Spiced minced lamb skewers

items.name: Tandoori Naan
items.description: Freshly baked leavened bread

items.name: Rogan Josh
items.description: Kashmiri slow-cooked lamb curry

items.name: Chicken Biryani
items.description: Fragrant basmati rice with spiced chicken

items.name: Dal Makhani
items.description: Slow-cooked black lentils in butter and cream

reviews.author: Arjun Mehta
reviews.comment: The biryani alone is worth the trip across the river. Exceptional.

reviews.author: Lisa Park
reviews.comment: Best Indian food in the area by far. The seekh kebabs are incredible.

reviews.author: Omar Farooq
reviews.comment: Authentic flavors, generous portions. Slightly slow on weekends.

restaurants.name: Sushi Zen
restaurants.description: A minimalist sushi counter experience in Tribeca. We serve omakase-only, sourcing fish daily from Tokyo's Toyosu market and sustainable local waters.

items.name: Standard Omakase (15 courses)
items.description: Seasonal selection of nigiri, sashimi, and small plates

items.name: Premium Omakase (20 courses)
items.description: Extended tasting with premium toro, uni, and wagyu

items.name: Otoro Nigiri
items.description: 2 pieces of fatty bluefin tuna

items.name: Uni Gunkan
items.description: Sea urchin on sushi rice

items.name: Wagyu Tataki
items.description: Lightly seared A5 wagyu with ponzu

reviews.author: Kenji Watanabe
reviews.comment: A once-in-a-lifetime experience every single visit. The chef's skill is extraordinary.

reviews.author: Claire Fontaine
reviews.comment: The best sushi I've ever had. Every piece is a masterwork.

reviews.author: Raj Patel
reviews.comment: Worth every penny. Book months in advance — it sells out fast.
